basic_details.job_title: NSUT Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 61 Assistant Professor, MO and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), a State University under Act 06 of 2018, Govt. of NCT of Delhi, Azad Hind Fauj Marg, Sector-3, Dwarka, New Delhi – 110078 has released official advertisements for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Group 'A' Non-Teaching Officer positions across various departments.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified on the University website in due course

application_fee.details: Fee is non-refundable. SC/ST/PwBD candidates applying under General Category will pay as per SC/ST/PwBD slab. Payment must be made through the online application portal.

age_limit.details: Age Relaxation: Available for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD candidates as per DoPT guidelines issued by the Government of India. | Campus Posting: Selected candidates may be posted or transferred to any NSUT campus — Main Campus (Dwarka), East Campus (Geeta Colony), or West Campus (Jaffarpur, Najafgarh).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and experience specified for each post: | Assistant Professor – Biological Sciences & Engineering / Bio-Technology: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. Assistant Professor – Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics: Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned/relevant subject from a recognized Indian or foreign university, plus cleared UGC/CSIR NET or SLET/SET; OR Ph.D. awarded as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (exempted from NET); OR Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked in the top 500 by QS, THE, or ARWU. Assistant Professor – Design: Bachelor's Degree or minimum 4-year Diploma AND Master's Degree or equivalent PG Diploma (First Class in both) in Engineering/Design or relevant branch with minimum 2 years of professional design experience after Master's; OR Integrated Master's Degree (First Class) with 3 years of professional design experience. Ph.D. in Design or allied field is desirable. Assistant Professor – Geo-Informatics: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. in relevant discipline AND M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant specialization, with First Class or equivalent in either Bachelor's or Master's degree. Ph.D. in relevant discipline is desirable. Associate Professor – Biological Sciences & Engineering / Bio-Technology: Ph.D. in relevant field with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level + minimum 6 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SCOPUS + minimum 8 years of teaching/research/industry experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.). Associate Professor – Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics: Ph.D. in concerned/allied discipline + Master's degree with at least 55% marks + minimum 8 years of teaching/research experience + minimum 7 peer-reviewed publications + total research score of 75 as per UGC 2018 norms. Associate Professor – Design: Ph.D. in relevant field + Bachelor's/Master's Degree or equivalent PG Diploma (First Class or equivalent) in Engineering/Design + minimum 6 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SSCI/AHCI journals + minimum 8 years of professional design experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.). Associate Professor – Geo-Informatics: Ph.D. in relevant discipline + Master's and Bachelor's Degree in relevant discipline with First Class or equivalent + minimum 8 years of teaching/research/industry experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.) with minimum 6 SCI research publications. | Campus Director (Age: up to 60 years): Ph.D. degree with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level in Engineering & Technology + minimum 2 Ph.D. scholars guided (degree awarded) as supervisor/co-supervisor + minimum 10 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SSCI journals + total 15 years of teaching/research/industry experience in regular scale, of which at least 5 years must be at the level of Professor. Training & Placement Officer (Age: up to 50 years): MBA/PGDM (2-year course) + UG degree in Engineering/Management/Sciences/Commerce + total 12 years of experience, of which at least 6 years in Training & Placement at Level 10 and above (7th CPC) or equivalent. UG degree in Engineering is desirable. Medical Officer (Age: up to 35 years): Recognized MBBS qualification as per the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 + completion of compulsory rotating internship. Candidates who have not yet completed internship may apply, provided they complete it before appointment.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding all vacancy packages are as follows: | *The above vacancies include backlog vacancies. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete both online and offline (hard copy) registration as follows:
Visit the official NSUT website: http://www.nsut.ac.in and fill the online application form in CAPITAL LETTERS.
Submit separate online applications and fees for each post applied for.
Ensure a valid email ID is provided that will remain active throughout the recruitment process.

After online submission, take a printout of the filled application form and attach self-attested copies of all relevant documents including educational certificates, marksheets, experience letters, research publications, category certificates, NOC from employer (if applicable), and any other supporting documents as applicable to the post.

Send the hard copy in an envelope superscribed with Post Applied For, Name, Address, Category, Applicant ID, and Department (for teaching posts) to: The Registrar, Netaji Subhas University of Technology, Azad Hind Fauj Marg, Sector-3, Dwarka, New Delhi – 110078.
Online application deadline: June 30, 2026. Hard copy deadline: July 15, 2026 by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q1. What is NSUT Recruitment 2026 all about?
faq.answer: NSUT Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Group ‘A’ Officer posts at Netaji Subhas University of Technology, Dwarka, New Delhi. The posts are being filled under Recruitment Notices NSUT/FACULTY/2026/02 and NSUT/GROUP ‘A’/2026/01 on regular or tenure basis, as per the advertised terms.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for NSUT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process opens on 26 May 2026 (10:00 AM) and closes on 30 June 2026 (midnight). The hard copy of the application with documents must reach NSUT by 15 July 2026 up to 5:00 PM, and written test/interview schedules will be notified later on the official website.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are released in NSUT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NSUT has notified 39 Assistant Professor and 19 Associate Professor vacancies across Biological Sciences & Engineering / Bio-Technology, Chemistry, Design, Geo-Informatics, Mathematics and Physics. In addition, there are 3 Group ‘A’ officer posts – Campus Director (1), Training & Placement Officer (1) and Medical Officer (1) – making a total of 61 posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the pay scales for NSUT 2026 teaching and officer posts?
faq.answer: Assistant Professors are placed in Level 10 (₹57,700–1,82,400) and Associate Professors in Level 13A1 (₹1,31,400–2,17,100) under 7th CPC. Campus Director carries Level 14 (₹1,44,200–2,18,200), Training & Placement Officer Level 13A1 (₹1,31,100–2,16,600) and Medical Officer Level 10 (₹56,100–1,77,500).

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for NSUT Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: For Biological Sciences & Engineering/Bio-Technology and Geo-Informatics, candidates need B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S./Integrated M.Tech in relevant branch with First Class in at least one degree. For Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, candidates require a Master’s degree with 55% marks plus NET/SLET/SET, or a Ph.D. as per UGC norms (NET exempt). For Design, a First Class Bachelor’s/4-year Diploma and Master’s/PG Diploma in Design/Engineering plus required professional experience is needed.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification and experience required for NSUT Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: Associate Professors require a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline with First Class at Bachelor’s or Master’s level and a minimum 8 years of teaching/research/industry experience, including at least 2 years post-Ph.D.. They must also have the prescribed number of SCI/SCIE/SCOPUS/UGC-listed publications and meet the UGC 2018 research score requirement, as detailed in the notification for each department.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NSUT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor, the maximum age is 35 years on the closing date of online application, and for Associate Professor, it is 50 years. Campus Director must be born on or after 30 June 1966, Training & Placement Officer on or after 30 June 1976, and Medical Officer on or after 30 June 1991, with applicable relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for NSUT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC and EWS candidates must pay ₹1,000 as registration fee + ₹1,000 as processing fee (₹2,000 total) per application. SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempt from registration fee and pay only ₹1,000 processing fee. The fee is non‑refundable and must be paid only through the online application portal.

title: NSUT Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 61 Assistant Professor, MO and More Posts
